message:
perf: add fast_cancel atomic flag to CxInner for lock-free cancellation checks

Every cancellation site previously only set cancel_requested behind a
RwLock write guard. On the wake hot path, checking cancellation required
acquiring the lock, adding contention and latency.

Add a fast_cancel AtomicBool to CxInner that is set with Release ordering
alongside cancel_requested in every cancellation path:
- ActorHandle::cancel()
- GenServerHandle::cancel()
- Cx::cancel_task(), Cx::cancel_region(), Cx::set_cancel_reason()
- TaskRecord::cancel()
- TaskHandle::cancel_inner(), JoinFuture drop
- LabRuntime poll quota exhaustion

This enables lock-free cancellation polling on the wake path while the
RwLock remains the source of truth for cancel_reason and other state.

Also switches LabRuntime::seen_io_tokens from std::HashSet to
DetHashSet for deterministic trace emission.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
